calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS., SEP-28-2006: JOHN P. ZANGHI, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY TED JANOWSKY, ESQ. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT ROBERT GRAY, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

IN OPEN COURT AND OFF THE RECORD, PLAINTIFF COUNSEL ZANGHI INFORMS THE COURT A SETTLEMENT HAS BEEN REACHED; COMMISSIONER SUE M. KAPLAN THEREUPON SIGNS IN OPEN COURT A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND, IN THE EVENT OF DEFAULT, STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

THE MATTER IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR IN D-218 DUE TO THE SETTLEMENT, AND THE CASE IS REMOVED FROM THE MASTER CALENDAR TRIAL DATE FOR MONDAY, OCT-02-2006.

COMMISSIONER SUE M. KAPLAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-218).
